attributes.action: Ban Use of UK Bases for US/Israel Strikes on Iran
attributes.additional_details: The US and Israel are pursuing military action against Iran that lacks UN authorization and violates international law. By allowing UK bases to be used for these operations, Britain becomes complicit in aggression, not defense. This makes the UK a legitimate target for retaliation, undermines our sovereignty, and ignores the will of the British people who oppose being dragged into another illegal war in the Middle East. Parliament must act now to uphold international law and keep Britain safe.
attributes.background: Prohibit the use of UK military bases, including Diego Garcia and RAF Fairford, for US or Israeli offensive military strikes against Iran. Formally declare the UK's non-participation in such actions and publicly condemn any violations of international law and the UN Charter.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Stop allowing the US to use British bases for any action against Iran" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762916
